ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Unique stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock ticker */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current trading status (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Total volume of shares traded on the trading day */,
  "ex_dividend" REAL /* Ex-dividend amount for the trading day */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the trading day */,
  "adj_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "adj_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "adj_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "adj_volume" TEXT /* Adjusted total volume of shares traded on the trading day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price (VWAP) of the stock on the trading day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price from the previous day */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique user ID */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of account creation */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique user ID */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stock was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" TEXT /* Unique alert ID */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique user ID */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value for the alert (e.g., price threshold, volume threshold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of alert creation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" TEXT /* Unique report ID */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique user ID */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of report creation */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
